entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea L., a legume characterized by subterranean pod development

entities.name: POD DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of peanut pod growth and maturation

entities.name: DARK CONDITION
entities.description: The light-absent environment of subterranean pod development

entities.name: ILLUMINA SEQUENCING
entities.description: High-throughput sequencing technology used to analyze transcripts

entities.name: DEVELOPMENTAL TRANSCRIPTOME
entities.description: The complete set of RNA transcripts during the development of peanut pods

entities.name: SEED
entities.description: The reproductive tissue within the peanut pod

entities.name: SHELL
entities.description: The outer protective tissue of the peanut pod

entities.name: DIFFERENTIALLY EXPRESSED TRANSCRIPTS
entities.description: Transcripts that show significant changes in expression levels across conditions or stages

entities.name: PHOTOSYNTHETIC GENES
entities.description: Genes involved in photosynthesis that are active in aerial and subterranean pods

entities.name: PHOTOMORPHOGENESIS GENES
entities.description: Genes that regulate plant growth in response to light

entities.name: CLUSTERING ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to group transcripts with similar expression profiles

entities.name: DNA SYNTHESIS
entities.description: The process of duplicating DNA during pod expansion

entities.name: CELL DIVISION
entities.description: The process of cell multiplication during pod expansion

entities.name: POD EXPANSION
entities.description: The stage of pod development characterized by rapid growth

entities.name: CELL EXPANSION
entities.description: The process of increasing cell size during seed filling

entities.name: STORAGE ACTIVITY
entities.description: The accumulation of nutrients and reserves during seed filling

entities.name: SEED FILLING
entities.description: The stage of pod development where the seed accumulates reserves
